rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE REGINALD BURKE LUCAS REVOCABLE TRUST ESTABLISH
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (No Street Address - Described As Two Of 20.55 Unassigned Acres, Triable Park Rd. Mariposa Ca 95338)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: 1) No reappraisal for sale has been filed. 2) Item 4c does not specify the date of sale. 3) Additional bond calculation appears to be incorrect. The current bond is just $7,000 and the assets on hand at the end of the last accounting were $5,629.07. 4) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LORRAINE D. ELLIOTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/19/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) The filing of a report of status of administration shall be deemed to include a petition requesting additional time for estate administration. For the Court to make an order, the report and petition must include a prayer specifying the relief sought, including the amount of time needed to resolve the tax issues and antcipated settlement agreement alluded to in the instant petition (LRSF 14.35.J.2). Please supplement the petition as necessary and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/05/2025 to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEFAN SOBCZAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/4/2025. The petition seems premature for the examiner review, as the only document that has been filed is the petition. Petition will be reviewed upon receiving the following documents: (1) No Notice of Hearing on file. (2) Need clarification/proof that the original will has been deposited with the court. (3) Need authorities for the Court to grant the determination of the bank account passing to the surviving spouse when the decedent's will specifically instructs the asset to be distributed to someone else (the decedent's trust) other than the surviving spouse. (4) Proposed order failed to specify the asset subject to this petition Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD OW
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/19/25 to address the following issues: 1. Proof of Publication has not been filed. 2. A verified declaration must be filed setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate to be used by the Court to determine the amount of the bond. In no event will the bond be less than $20,000. All documents to be filed by 5/5/25.
